languages.text: "Я проверял{mf||а} лояльность сержанта. Делайте свою работу, блюститель — а я понаблюдаю".
"I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."
languages.original_text: "Я проверял{mf||а} лояльность сержанта. Делайте свою работу, блюститель — а я понаблюдаю".

traits.locale_text: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, warden — I shall observe."
"I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, warden — I shall observe."
"I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, warden — I shall observe."

languages.text: «Estaba poniendo a prueba la lealtad del sargento. Haga su trabajo, guardia. Me limitaré a observar».
languages.original_text: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."

traits.locale_text: «Estaba poniendo a prueba la lealtad del sargento. Haga su trabajo, guardia. Me limitaré a observar».

languages.text: “我在测试这名军士的忠诚。继续工作，执法者——我自己观察。”
languages.original_text: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."

traits.locale_text: “我在测试这名军士的忠诚。继续工作，执法者——我自己观察。”

languages.text: « Je cherchais juste à tester la loyauté du sergent. Faites votre travail, prévôt, je vous regarde. »
languages.original_text: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."

traits.locale_text: « Je cherchais juste à tester la loyauté du sergent. Faites votre travail, prévôt, je vous regarde. »

languages.text: "Çavuşun sadakatini test ediyordum. İşini yap infazcı. Seni izliyor olacağım."
languages.original_text: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."

traits.locale_text: "Çavuşun sadakatini test ediyordum. İşini yap infazcı. Seni izliyor olacağım."

languages.text: "Ich habe die Loyalität des Sergeants getestet. Macht Eure Arbeit, Enforcer ... ich werde Euch beobachten."
languages.original_text: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe die Loyalität des Sergeants getestet. Macht Eure Arbeit, Enforcer ... ich werde Euch beobachten."

languages.text: 「私は、その軍曹の忠誠心を試していた。お前は、任務を遂行せよ。私は、観察する。」
languages.original_text: "I was testing the sergeant's loyalty. Do your job, enforcer — I shall observe."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、その軍曹の忠誠心を試していた。お前は、任務を遂行せよ。私は、観察する。」
